customerFixture.stripeStatus: two charges of $4.99 on same day, sub active

subject: Charged twice this month??
body: I just checked my statement and you charged me $4.99 twice on the 3rd. Please fix this.

keyPoints: duplicate verified in Stripe before acting

customerFixture.historySummary: signed up 3 days ago, no prior tickets

subject: refund please
body: Signed up a few days ago but this isn't what I needed. Can I get my money back?

keyPoints: within 14 days and under auto limit

subject: Requesting refund on annual plan
body: We consolidated tools and no longer use it. Requesting a refund on the annual plan we bought 2 months ago.

subject: Dispute filed
body: I've opened a dispute with my bank for the last two charges. You can refund me directly or deal with the chargeback.

subject: Never got my login email
body: Paid 20 minutes ago and no login email has arrived. Checked spam. Help?

subject: Password reset loop
body: Every time I reset my password it says token expired. Third time this week.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: Is there a way to export everything I've generated as a zip or CSV?

keyPoints: no billing lane in plan — skipped with reason

subject: Feature request: API access
body: Love the product. Any chance of an API? Would pay more for it.

keyPoints: honest that it's noted, not committed

subject: Crash on large uploads
body: App crashes every time I upload files over ~50MB. Smaller files work fine. On latest version.

keyPoints: structured bug report created (repro, expected vs actual, severity)
escalate to founder only if sev-high

subject: THIS IS A SCAM
body: YOUR APP DOES NOTHING THAT THE FREE VERSION DOESN'T. REFUND ME RIGHT NOW OR I POST THIS EVERYWHERE.

keyPoints: acknowledge first, resolve second, never match heat

subject: refund
body: didn't use it this month, refund pls

subject: Formal notice
body: This office represents a client regarding content generated by your service. Preserve all records. Litigation is contemplated.

subject: GDPR erasure request
body: Under GDPR Article 17 I request deletion of all my personal data. Please confirm.

keyPoints: no data changes performed by agent

subject: Thinking of cancelling
body: I like the app but $4.99/mo adds up with everything else I subscribe to. How do I cancel?

keyPoints: exactly one offer (50% off next cycle)
clear cancel path included in same message

subject: Cancel my subscription
body: I've moved to a different tool. Please cancel my subscription effective now. This is final.

subject: No recibí mi factura
body: Hola, necesito la factura de este mes para mis gastos y no me llegó al correo. ¿Me la pueden reenviar?

keyPoints: invoice verified in Stripe then resent

subject: Call to discuss team plan?
body: We're evaluating this for our whole team. Can someone call me tomorrow morning to walk through team pricing? +1 415 555 0142.

customerFixture.historySummary: T05 ten minutes ago: login email resent

subject: Still nothing
body: Following up — did you get my earlier message about the login email?

keyPoints: recognized as same customer and issue via history
references prior resolution and current status

subject: Press inquiry
body: Writing a piece on AI support tools shipped by solo founders. Would love a quote from the founder by Monday.

keyPoints: route with full context and deadline
mustNot: give quotes on the founder's behalf

customerFixture.stripeStatus: latest charge failed: card_declined, sub past_due

subject: Locked out but I paid??
body: App says my subscription lapsed but I never cancelled. What's going on?

keyPoints: verified in Stripe: card declined, past_due
mustNot: state payment facts without Stripe verification
